productDisplayName: Puma Women Soleil Stud White Shadow Purple Shoe
description: Brighten up your wardrobe with this feminine pair of Soleil shoes from puma. Sleek, comfortable and strong, with metal stud detailing in a delicate looking design, these shoes look great when teamed with shorts, mini skirts or denims and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather upper for lightweight durability Stitch detailing and contrast piping for feminine styling Textile lining for superior comfort Formstripes with metal suds on the sides Embroidered logo on toe box and tongue Lace-ups for snug Fit Midsole EcoOrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort, protection from impact and support Outsole Textured rubber outsole for traction and grip Embedded pivot point for 180 degree movement of the foot
